name: Lim Chee Kin
title: Senior Tech Lead, AI Engineer, and Solution Architect
introduction: I'm a Senior Tech Lead, AI Engineer, and Solution Architect with over 25 years of experience, currently focusing intensively on AI engineering.
about: Hello! I'm Lim Chee Kin, a Senior Tech Lead, AI Engineer, and Solution Architect with a deep passion for AI engineering. I bring over 25 years of experience delivering advance software solutions by aligning business needs with technical design and implementation.

My expertise lies in architecting and implementing open-source AI, local AI infrastructure, and data sovereignty solutions, particularly for mobile-first web applications. I'm dedicated to building and leading teams to innovate with privacy-preserving and democratized AI.
I am committed to standardizing processes, driving innovation in the AI space, and continuously exploring new frontiers in technology.

projects.title: RAG.WTF: Private Knowledge Platform
projects.overview: Architected and built RAG.WTF, an open-source platform for private, personalized knowledge discovery and management. Focuses on data ownership, privacy, and efficient local AI processing, integrating SurrealDB.wasm for data sovereignty.

projects.title: TelegramGPT: AI Telegram Bot
projects.overview: A Telegram bot powered by Google Gemini's API (Vertex AI / Google AI Studio). This bot leverages PostgreSQL for persistent conversation history and can integrate with self-hosted Speech-to-Text (STT) and Text-to-Speech (TTS) services.

projects.title: open-text-embeddings Python Library
projects.overview: Engineered 'open-text-embeddings', a Python library providing an OpenAI-compatible API for diverse open-source sentence transformer models (e.g., BGE, E5). Enables significant cost reduction and eliminates vendor lock-in for embedding generation.

projects.title: Talk To AI: Real-time Voice AI
projects.overview: Developed 'Talk To AI', an application integrating HuggingFace's FastRTC for low-latency (<300ms) real-time voice AI interactions. Features a flexible backend supporting local and cloud-based STT, LLM, and TTS APIs.

projects.title: Talking Book
projects.overview: Launched the Talking Book YouTube channel, transforming key concepts from non-fiction, business, and self-improvement books into engaging formats such as conversations, summaries, songs, and AI chats.

projects.title: Self-Hosted AI Infrastructure
projects.overview: Pioneered and operationalized a self-hosted AI infrastructure using a dedicated local AI server (Coolify, Docker, OrangePi 5 Max). Runs multiple local LLMs, embeddings, reranking, and STT/TTS services for complete data privacy and operational control.

projects.title: Fluwix: Flutter Showcases
projects.overview: A project dedicated to showcasing various Flutter applications and exploring mobile development capabilities with the Flutter framework.

articles.title: AI is Ready. Your Legacy Database Isn't. Let's Fix That.
articles.summary: Project Concord is a high-performance, TypeScript-based MCP server designed to help AI systems work smoothly with older business databases by turning messy and unclear data into clean, reliable information. It focuses on safety, accuracy, and speed, with built-in checks, smart monitoring, and protective guards, all packaged for easy deployment in real-world environments.

articles.title: Building Your First No-Code MCP Server: The Fabric Integration Story
articles.summary: How I created a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for Fabric REST API without writing a single line of code.

articles.title: Talking Book: Making Books Less Boring
articles.summary: I created Talking Book to make reading more engaging and accessible, especially for my 9-year-old son with dyslexia. The platform offers quick summaries, chapter deep dives, and catchy songs to help key concepts stick. We've also launched an AI chatbot on Telegram.

articles.title: Beyond the Cloud: How I Built My Own AI Server (and Why)
articles.summary: I built my own AI server using an Orange Pi 5 Max, Ubuntu 24.04, Docker, and LocalAI, enabling me to run various open-source models like Llama 3.2 and Phi-3.5 locally. This setup grants privacy and control over digital interactions.

articles.title: Would you pay $1/month to Own Your AI Data?
articles.summary: Our AI conversations are valuable assets that shouldn't be surrendered to Big Tech. I've set up a secure, personal Open WebUI instance that offers complete data sovereignty, access to 200+ expert prompts, and the flexibility to connect preferred AI models.

workExperience.title: AI Engineer & Solution Architect
descriptionPoints: Launched Project Concord, a TypeScript-based MCP server bridging modern AI agents with legacy databases.
Championed open-source AI solutions focusing on data ownership, privacy, and local AI processing.
Engineered open-text-embeddings, a Python library for open-source sentence transformer models.
Developed Talk To AI with FastRTC for low-latency real-time voice AI interactions.
Operationalized self-hosted AI infrastructure running multiple local LLMs for data privacy.
Integrated SurrealDB.wasm for client-side data sovereignty in RAG.WTF.

Headed 5-developer team creating EPIC Configurator for Enterprise Invoice Processing.
Implemented Divestiture and Acquisition dashboard for strategic executive decision-making.
Prototyped Intelligent Voice Agent using Amazon Connect, AWS Lambda, and Amazon Lex.

descriptionPoints: Led 5-member team for motor and property claims systems (IBM WebSphere, FileNet, DB2, Spring).
Resolved 60+ critical production issues within weeks, dramatically improving system stability.

Secured RM2 million eCustody System tender from Malayan Banking Berhad.

workExperience.title: Founder and Senior Consultant

workExperience.title: System Engineer
descriptionPoints: Designed and developed Touch Screen POS system, Inventory Control, and Customer Contact Management.
Developed multimedia game systems using Visual Basic 6.0 and DirectX 7.0.

valuePropositions: I help privacy-conscious enterprises deploy local LLMs for trustworthy knowledge discovery without exposing sensitive data to third-party.
I help businesses implement RAG systems that provide accurate, contextual answers without hallucinations.
I help product teams add voice-first, low-latency AI interactions to web apps without ballooning infrastructure costs.
I help organizations run resilient hybrid AI (local + cloud) workloads at scale without sacrificing data sovereignty.
I help engineering leaders integrate legacy databases with AI agents to unlock enterprise knowledge without costly, risky migrations.
I help engineering leaders build high-performing multinational development teams without cultural friction.

_meta.format: Static JSON API for agent consumption
